headline: Lateral Flow Assay Market: 2026 Research Report - AI and Digital Technology Integration to Propel Lateral Flow Assay Market Expansion - Forecast to 2030
summary: The global lateral flow assay (LFA) market is projected to grow from USD 10.01 billion in 2024 to USD 15.42 billion by 2030, driven by increasing demand for point-of-care testing and the rising prevalence of infectious diseases. The LFA market encompasses the development, manufacturing, and distribution of test kits and related products across healthcare, pharmaceuticals, food safety, and more. Segmented by product type, applications, technology, and end-users, the market thrives on advancements

headline: Thermo Fisher Scientific’s Clinical Research Business Named a Leader Among CROs in 2026 ISG Provider Lens™ Report for Use of AI in Clinical Trials
summary: WALTHAM, Mass., May 06, 2026--Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc., the world leader in serving science, earned a Leader designation among contract research organizations (CROs) in the 2026 ISG Provider Lens™ Life Sciences Digital Services report, underscoring the company’s continued investment in digital innovation across the clinical development continuum.
